/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -shared  -o mode.cpython-310-aarch64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/mode.dir/home/w2/w2/cpp/src/mode_bindings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mode.dir/home/w2/w2/cpp/src/mode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mode.dir/home/w2/w2/cpp/src/onnxpolicy.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN:/home/w2/w2/cpp/onnxruntime/lib" /home/w2/w2/cpp/onnxruntime/lib/libonnxruntime.so
